title: VS Code Installation Mission
description: Mission to set up your development environment!

scenes.speech: Agent! Your mission is to 'Build a Development Base'! 🏗️
scenes.title: Mission Briefing: Base Construction
scenes.content: Task: Install VS Code and create your first file! This is where programmers live!

scenes.speech: VS Code is like a 'home for code'! It's used by programmers all around the world!
scenes.title: What is VS Code?
scenes.content: VS Code is the best 'editor' for writing code. It's easy to use with features like color coding and auto-completion!
scenes.highlight:
VS Code Features:
・Free to use
・Loved by engineers worldwide
・Color-coded for easy reading
・Extensible with additional features

scenes.speech: Let's install it with a grown-up's help!
scenes.title: Installation Plan
scenes.content: Download and install VS Code from the official website. If you're stuck, ask an adult for help!
scenes.highlight:
Steps:
1. Open code.visualstudio.com
2. Click the 'Download' button
3. Run the installer
4. Launch VS Code!

scenes.speech: Now, let's create your first file!
scenes.title: File Creation Plan
scenes.content: Open VS Code, create a folder called 'my-first-app', and inside it, create a file called 'memo.txt'!
scenes.highlight:
Challenge:
① Folder name: my-first-app
② File name: memo.txt
③ Write and save 3 lines of your choice

scenes.title: Useful Extensions
scenes.content: Prettier (auto-format), Live Server (instant preview), GitLens (history view). Just three boost your speed dramatically.

scenes.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
scenes.content: Cmd+S (save), Cmd+P (find file), Cmd+Shift+P (command palette). Even three lets you work without a mouse.

scenes.speech: Mission accomplished! Take a screenshot and submit it to get 260 points! 🎯
scenes.title: Mission Complete!
scenes.content: Your programmer's base is complete! Take a screenshot of your VS Code and submit it on Slack!
